metadata.smog_zone_method: 12km urban core + Raiwind + Shahdara/GT Road corridor
metadata.aviation_note: International aviation = LHE-origin fuel only; bilateral policy scope.

warnings: ci_lower_t absent in v1.3 JSON — per-sector scales used

division_historical.note: Historical sub-sector split derived from v1.3 sub_sector_share proportions when raw sub-sector arrays are unavailable in the JSON.

point_sources.name: Allama Iqbal International Airport (LTO zone)
point_sources.description: ICAO LTO cycle emissions within 100m mixing height. Covers taxi, take-off, climb-out, approach for all scheduled and charter operations from IATA code LHE.
point_sources.data_source: CAAI monthly movements + ICAO Doc 9889 EFs

point_sources.name: Lahore Junction Railway Station
point_sources.description: Main intercity terminus on ML-1 (Karachi–Peshawar). Highest dwell + marshalling emissions in Lahore District.

point_sources.name: Lahore Cantt Railway Station
point_sources.description: Secondary intercity stop on ML-1; significant suburban traffic.

point_sources.name: Mughalpura Locomotive Works / Freight Yard
point_sources.description: Largest locomotive workshop in Pakistan; shunting and idling emissions from diesel traction.

point_sources.name: Shahdara Bagh Station (ML-1 North)
point_sources.description: Northern entry node for ML-1 into Lahore District.

point_sources.name: Thokar Niaz Baig Interchange (M-2/Ring Road)
point_sources.description: Busiest motorway interchange in Lahore Division; convergence of M-2 (Lahore–Islamabad) and Lahore Ring Road South. Major congestion and cold-start emission hotspot.

point_sources.name: Kot Lakhpat Industrial / M-2 Toll
point_sources.description: Western industrial corridor toll node; high HDV share.

point_sources.name: GT Road / Shahdara Flyover Node
point_sources.description: Grand Trunk Road northern entry; mixed HDV + 2-3 wheelers. Winter smog corridor.

point_sources.name: Raiwind Road / DHA Phase 6 Interchange
point_sources.description: Southern ring road and Raiwind industrial brick-kiln corridor.

point_sources.name: Ferozpur Road / Canal Bank Intersection
point_sources.description: High-volume urban arterial in core Lahore; Bus Rapid Transit corridor candidate.

rag_chunks.text: Lahore District transport forecast: 6.46 Mt CO₂e in 2026 (+4.8% vs 2025). Road 86.3% (5.58 Mt). Intl aviation 11.6% (LHE-origin fuel, bilateral scope). Railways 1.2%. Dom aviation 0.9%. 151 real UCs (Union_Council.shp). Model: Prophet MAPE=0.35% R²=0.9957.
Lahore District historical transport: 27.56 Mt CO₂e over 60 months (Jan 2021–Dec 2025). Monthly mean 459k t. Road share 87.6%. Source: transport_features_v13.csv (60 months).

Road transport dominates at 86.3% (5.58 Mt) in Lahore District 2026. Emission trend: +30.9%. Highest-intensity UCs: Fruit Mandi, Baghat Pura, Kasur Pura, Ganj Kalan, Bostan Colony. Priorities: BRT/LRT on high-intensity corridors, EV motorcycle incentives, reversing CNG drift, odd-even routing Dec/Jan for 62 smog-zone UCs.

Lahore District transport point sources: 10 identified infrastructure nodes (airport_lto, freight_terminal, rail_station, road_junction). Airport LTO zone at Allama Iqbal International Airport (IATA: LHE). Rail: Lahore Junction, Cantt, Mughalpura Yard, Shahdara. Road: Thokar Niaz Baig interchange, Ferozpur/Canal, GT Road/Shahdara.
road in Lahore District: 5578k t CO₂e (86.3%) in 2026. Peak month: 7.
intl avi in Lahore District: 747k t CO₂e (11.6%) in 2026. Peak month: 12.
railways in Lahore District: 80k t CO₂e (1.2%) in 2026. Peak month: 10.
dom avi in Lahore District: 58k t CO₂e (0.9%) in 2026. Peak month: 7.
